_comment: Personal machine overrides — symlinked to ~/.claude/settings.local.json on non-work hosts
_personalMachineMcpSetup: Personal-only MCPs (garmin, strava) are configured via claude mcp add, not settings.json.
claude mcp add --scope user garmin -- uvx --python 3.12 --from git+https://github.com/Taxuspt/garmin_mcp garmin-mcp
claude mcp add --scope user strava -- npx -y @r-huijts/strava-mcp-server
Keep secrets out of dotfiles and use environment variables at runtime.
